reviews.review_title: A core part of my production
reviews.review_description: Having a notes app as in depth and available as SuperNotes is a big help in my workflow and everyday organization of ideas. Knowing I'm not using it in its intended form as a student, the format of supernotes has allowed me to capture and elaborate my ideas and designs in a way no other word pad or notes app has before. Audio/video projects, fashion designs, storytelling timelines, all become mappable in a streamlined manner that allows me to maximize my production and allow my creativity to flow
While I wasn't looking for a Meta Quest notes app, it's really helpful saving whatever I'm browsing or reading in VR to Supernotes so I can see it back at my desk or on my phone.

I can use this app to write in whatever environment I want in VR. I can go to the beach, I can go to fish, and be a writer there. In past times, if you were a writer, you would have to have a home in front of a lake away from civilization to get this kind of experience. Thank you Supernotes!
This app is one of my favorites already. It has such a nice layout and helps me keep organized. I definitely recommend it.
Love the work and interface
the app is a good at especially since there is no built in notes app. I use this for school and its been good for notes. Hopefully there will be an option for longer promts!
super useful app
Good ui

reviews.review_title: Good but could use more customisation
reviews.review_description: The app itself is great, it does its job perfecrly fine but it lacks customisation, like highlighting, bold, maybe unique font options, i cant paste in images because it makes it into a link, just all these things bring it down.
I can easily make notes and I would highly recommend it, thanks devs!
Seems great so far! As an owner of multiple businesses, Im happy to have found a good notes app on the VR!
its cool so cool

reviews.review_title: I can’t login it’s stuck on page
reviews.review_description:
I don’t know this problem happened by any
means but after me logging. it’s can verify but I am cilck open in vr is stuck on the same page and when I close it, it still stays on the log in page.

developer_response.body: Hey 👋 The latest Meta Horizon OS update added in-app browser support, which temporarily broke our login page. We've recently released a fix — please update and try again! As a small team of two, we’d love for you to give Supernotes another go 🙌 If you need any additional help, reach us at help@supernotes.app

reviews.review_description: great

I like the app, im using it in Quest 2 headset, im using it to store url links to utilize in vrchat worlds to import onto world players.
also using it for saving favorite sites and personal reminders. It has an easy ui, improvements could be made for copy and paste operation. But other that its a great app. Try it out.
Instant Uninstall as it asked for a login and sign up...i'd rather keep all my data on my quest,so no thanks
Works amazing i can take all the notes i need And i can quote my friends
Stuck on the login page

developer_response.body: Hey 👋 The latest Meta Horizon OS update added in-app browser support, which temporarily broke our login page. We've recently released a fix — please update and try again! As a small team of two, we’d love for you to give Supernotes another go 🙌 If you need any additional help, reach us at help@supernotes.app

reviews.review_description: This app is real amazing exseeding my expectation.
Ideal to keep notes which you might want to check while using the Quest 3. (Useful websites, etc.) Also available on mobile devices, which makes it even more convenient. Definitely recommended.

Super Notes on Meta Quest is a game-changer for VR productivity. Its intuitive interface, organised date wise note maker and seamless integration make note-taking in virtual reality surprisingly efficient. It’s perfect for brainstorming, journaling, or organizing thoughts while immersed. Highly recommended for multitaskers! Great work!

reviews.review_title: A perfect app to use in VR
reviews.review_description: This app is incredible! Very easy to use and soo much organized, this app is helping me a lot, I recommend 1 hundred percent!

I have been looking for an app like this for a long time. A VR app that allows me to take notes while simultaneously watching videos on the browser. It’s simple concept and you would think there are plenty of apps out there that help you accomplish this, but I tried a bunch of apps on the Meta store and all failed to deliver… some have no way to organize notes, some are too painful to navigate. By contrast, Supernotes is simple to use and very functional. I also love that it also doubles as a task manager. Please don’t stop what you’re doing!
Really great app for productivity I use it to take notes when I study in vr ! Highly recommend!
